params.name: Salmon of Knowledge
params.description:
On Jan 10, 221 AD, Finn ate the flesh of the wise salmon and gained the ability to see into the future.
Legend has it that within an ancient holy well lives wise salmon. As a result of its prolonged exposure to the well, the salmon has acquired extraordinary intelligence, and whoever eats its flesh will gain the same boon. Therefore, countless people have tried to catch it throughout history, but few have succeeded. Those who have succeeded have become world-famous heroes.
